label: Liquidation Monitor
description: Real-time cascade risk monitor showing at-risk DeFi positions, health factors, and liquidation price proximity.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn=[strategies,defi,risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData(). 0.6 ✓ isLoading forwarded to TableWidget skeleton. 0.7 ✓ emptyMessage='No at-risk positions'. 0.8 NOTED — context does not expose error; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions. 0.9 ✓ no dead code. NOTE: 'Cascade Zone' ($2,740) and '24h Liquidated' ($4.2M) KPI values are hardcoded placeholder strings — not computed from context data; flag for L4 functional review.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ liquidationPositions sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook. 1.2 ✓ context calls useGlobalScope() and applies org/client/strategy cascade. 1.3-1.5 ✓ scope cascade wired in context. 1.6 ✓ empty scope = unfiltered dataset. 1.7 ✓ liquidation position mock data lives in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

knownIssues: headerMetrics 'Cascade Zone' ($2,740) and '24h Liquidated' ($4.2M) are hardcoded placeholder strings — should be computed from liquidationPositions data (L4 item)
findings: 0.8 NOTE: strategies-data-context does not surface API error field. WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions.
L4 FLAG: Two KPI strip values ('Cascade Zone', '24h Liquidated') are hardcoded; atRiskCount is correctly computed from context data.
Previously known issue resolved: data was inline MOCK_POSITIONS; now sourced from strategies-data-context via useStrategiesData().
